user.title: Connect to your SX Evolution's CAN bus
user.description: Home Assistant talks to the DOBISS Max200 through a socketcand daemon running near the bus. Tell me where to find it.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the machine running socketcand. For example: 192.168.1.10 or homeserver.local.
data_description.port: TCP port socketcand is listening on. The default for this integration is 29536.
data_description.interface: Name of the CAN interface on the socketcand host. The default for this integration is can0.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to your DOBISS CAN bus
reauth_confirm.description: Home Assistant lost the connection. Confirm or update the socketcand details below and we'll try again.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the machine running socketcand.
data_description.port: TCP port socketcand is listening on (default 29536).
data_description.interface: Name of the CAN interface on the socketcand host (typically can0).

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach socketcand. Check the host, port, and that the CAN interface is up on the socketcand machine.
error.unknown: Something went wrong. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This DOBISS connection is already set up in Home Assistant.
abort.reauth_successful: Reconnected to the DOBISS CAN bus.

user.title: Add a DOBISS module
user.description: Each physical DOBISS module gets its own entry here. Once added, you'll be able to attach lights and shutters to it.

data_description.module: The letter assigned to the DOBISS module (A, B, C, ...). Each letter can only be used once.
data_description.name: Optional. Use a name like "Kitchen lights" or "Ground floor" instead of the default "Module A".
data_description.dimmable: Turn this on if the physical module is a dimmer. Every light on it will then expose a brightness slider. Relay modules should leave this off.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure module
reconfigure.description: What would you like to do with this module?

add_light.title: Add a light
add_light.description: Pick the output this light is wired to. Whether it dims or just toggles is determined by the module's dimmer setting.

data_description.output: The output number on the module this light is wired to (1, 2, 3, …). Each output can only be used by one light or shutter.
data_description.name: Optional. The name Home Assistant will show, for example "Kitchen ceiling" or "Reading lamp".

add_shutter.title: Add a shutter
add_shutter.description: Shutters use two outputs on the same module: one drives the motor up and the other drives it down.

data_description.up_output: The output number wired to the motor's UP direction.
data_description.down_output: The output number wired to the motor's DOWN direction. Must differ from the up output.
data_description.name: Optional. The name Home Assistant will show, for example "Living room blind" or "Bedroom screen".

remove_output.title: Remove an output
remove_output.description: Pick the light or shutter you want to remove from this module. Its Home Assistant entity will disappear on the next reload.

data_description.output: Lists every output currently configured on this module.

edit_module.title: Edit module settings
edit_module.description: Update this module's letter, name, or dimmer setting. Toggling the dimmer flag applies to every light already on this module. They will switch between brightness-capable and on/off after the next reload.

data_description.module: The letter assigned to the DOBISS module (A, B, C, ...). Each letter can only be used once.
data_description.name: Optional. Use a name like "Kitchen lights" or "Ground floor" instead of the default "Module A".
data_description.dimmable: Turn this on if the physical module is a dimmer. Applies to every light on this module.

error.invalid_module: Use a single letter from A to Z.
error.module_already_exists: You already have a module with that letter.
error.invalid_output: Output number must be 1 or higher.
error.duplicate_output: Another light or shutter on this module is already using that output.
error.same_output: Up and down need to be different outputs.
error.no_outputs_to_remove: This module doesn't have any outputs to remove yet.

abort.no_outputs_to_remove: This module doesn't have any outputs to remove yet.

refresh.name: Refresh state
refresh.description: Asks DOBISS to broadcast the current state of every output. Useful if Home Assistant's cached state has drifted from reality.

cannot_send.message: Couldn't send the command to DOBISS. Check that socketcand and the CAN interface are still up.

cannot_connect.title: DOBISS CAN bus connection lost
cannot_connect.description: Home Assistant can no longer reach the socketcand daemon at {host} for CAN interface {interface}. Check that socketcand is running and that your network connection is healthy. Use **Reconfigure** on the DOBISS SX Evolution integration to update the connection settings if they have changed.
